rule_metadata.author: RedCanary, Sigma formatting by Micah Babinski
rule_metadata.title: AdSearch Reg Runkey Persistence Execution (RedCanary Threat Detection Report)

rules.rule_text:
title: AdSearch Reg Runkey Persistence Execution (RedCanary Threat Detection Report)
id: b50624c2-7867-4685-817e-88c72da264c7
status: experimental
description: Detects registry modifications to CurrentVersion\Run key, associated
  with AdSearch. Part of the RedCanary 2023 Threat Detection Report.
references:
- https://redcanary.com/threat-detection-report/threats/adsearch/
author: RedCanary, Sigma formatting by Micah Babinski
date: 2023/05/10
tags:
- attack.persistence
- attack.t1547.001
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    CommandLine|contains|all:
    - reg
    - add
    - currentversion\run
  condition: selection
falsepositives:
- Rule is likely to require tuning to exclude normal, authorized activity
level: low
